titles.text: Bakushou!! All Yoshimoto Quiz Ou Ketteisen DX
爆笑!! オール吉本クイズ王決定戦DX

descriptions.text: Bakushō!! All Yoshimoto Quiz Ou Ketteisen DX is a quiz game based on the popular TV show Yoshimoto Club. There are two different modes. The first mode has the player going on a fantasy quest to rescue a princess and the player has to answer questions correctly to bypass monsters. The second mode is a classic game show in which the player must answer as many questions correctly as possible to get the highest number of points.
